candidate_summary: TSAMPA-CACHE: anticipatory offline KV-prefill based on frequency/temporal/domain forecasts; portable serialized KV pouch shipped to edge; rehydrate by appending small per-query prefix.
rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.note: Directly anticipatory pre-warming of LLM instances based on workload predictability; functional twin of TSAMPA-CACHE anticipatory pre-roasting.
Pre-computed RAG context caches for inference acceleration; anticipatory cache primitive.
Explicit offline learning + online adaptation cache; matches offline-pre-roast + online-rehydrate split.
Uses historical-request distribution for caching; overlaps frequency-forecast pre-warming.
Enterprise KV layer with pre-loaded portable KV cache shipped across nodes; matches portable serialized KV pouch primitive.
Anticipatory KV prefetch survey covers exactly the forecast-and-prefetch primitive.
Entropy-guided per-layer budget; different operation (compression-style), not anticipatory prefill.

fail_reason: Six independent prior-art hits above semantic and functional thresholds across distinct effect clusters: WarmServe workload-predictive prewarming (sem=0.92, func=0.92) is a direct anticipatory pre-warming twin; LMCache pre-loaded KV cache covers portable serialized KV; offline+online semantic caching covers offline-pre-roast / online-rehydrate split; InfiniGen predictive KV prefetch is anticipatory KV; IC-Cache covers historical-frequency caching; Prefix-Fusion RAG cache covers pre-computed RAG context cache. TSAMPA-CACHE's core primitive (anticipatory offline KV pre-fill with portable shipping and rehydrate) is already well established. Rule total_hits>=1 -> FAIL is satisfied 6x.
